modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty managing multiple rows, columns, or cells in Google Sheets

full_description_text:  
I'm having trouble with Google Sheets when trying to add, delete, or hide more than one row, column, or cell at a time. It seems like I can only manage them one by one, which is really slowing me down. I need a more efficient way to handle multiple selections, but I'm not sure how to do that.
short_description: Difficulty managing multiple rows, columns, or cells in Google Sheets
description: I'm having trouble with Google Sheets when trying to add, delete, or hide more than one row, column, or cell at a time. It seems like I can only manage them one by one, which is really slowing me down. I need a more efficient way to handle multiple selections, but I'm not sure how to do that.
